svg.title: Simply Pray brand board
svg.desc: Brand board for Simply Pray with the official logo, color system, typography, and voice.
svg.text: DM Sans body · Cormorant Garamond display accents (family standard: DM Sans)
Pray with depth. Remember every prayer.
Reverent, calm, distraction-free. Pre-launch: waitlist CTAs, never "download." No streak-guilt or manipulation.
